title: Rewrite the following as expert CV writter, for a Teacher’s Resume summarize the below:

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Rewrite the following as expert CV writter, for a Teacher’s Resume summarize the below:
"
Duties Performed

🡪	Taking Classroom Activities
🡪	Used to design Table of Content (TOC), Lesson Plan, worksheets.
🡪	Preparing teaching tools.

Achievement

🡪	Phonetic book reading book
🡪	Workbook designing – Sr.kg


Career Profile
Sr. No.	Responsibility
01	Planning of syllabus / updating as per requirement.
02	Submission of plans, assessments to be done on time.
03	Teaching the syllabus patiently and reaching out each and every child.
04	Setting up learning centers in the class as per requirements.
05	Assessing students as per the plan worked out by the coordinators, Headmistress & Principal Director.
06	Bring to the notice of the coordinator or the Headmistress any wrong act witnessed.
07	Corrections of notebooks.
08	Report cards, assessment sheets to be explained properly to the parents on 1-1 basis so that each & every parent can be given a comfortable time. 
09	To fulfil all the assigned duties of parents’ day, open house day, grandparent’s party & any other event.
10	To participate in each and every in-house activity as and when needed and do the decorations as required.
11	Take initiative if any of the requirements are unfulfilled. Bring in new ideas & share them with colleagues.
12	Maintain housekeeping charts & check the duties of maids. Be polite with them & get work done tactfully.
13	Keep a check on the material used, provided by the school. Avoid wastage, check unnecessary lights & fans. All the material provided by the school is to be handed over at the end of the year. Any loss has to be borne personally.
14	Discuss any behavior problems with the psychologists& take a follow up of the same.
15	Bring the students out for assembly as per class’s turn.
16	Taking the prayers every day.
17	Take the attendance & start the day.
18	Leave the bus students, auto students & then assemble the students in one class & leave them taking turns to mind them.  

19	Pre-preparation and reporting for the day
20	THINGS TO BE MAINTAINED
1.	Worksheet file.
2.	Assessment file.
3.	Lesson plan register.
4.	Assessments register.
5.	General file for circulars, letters, applications, etc.
6.	Folders – teachers reference papers.
7.	Teaching aids & activities of your own class.
8.	Stationary box.
9.	Aprons for students & teachers.
10.	Colors, plates, spoons, glasses, filter, trays, chalk, duster
"

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
As an experienced Teacher, I have performed a wide range of duties related to classroom activities, including designing Table of Content (TOC), Lesson Plans and worksheets, and preparing teaching tools. My notable achievements include creating a phonetic reading book and designing a workbook for Senior KG students.

In my career profile, I have demonstrated my ability to plan and update syllabus as per requirements, submit plans and assessments within deadlines, and teach the syllabus with patience and attention to every child. Furthermore, I have expertise in setting up learning centers as per requirements, assessing students as per coordinators' plans, and bringing any misconduct to the attention of the coordinator or Headmistress.

I take pride in explaining students' assessment sheets and report cards to parents on a personal basis and fulfilling assigned duties of parents' day, open house day, grandparent's party, and other events. I also participate in in-house activities, decorating as required, and take initiatives to bring new ideas and share them with colleagues.

I understand the importance of maintaining the housekeeping charts, checking the duties of maids, and being polite while tactfully getting work done. I make sure to keep a check on the material provided by the school and avoid wastage or unnecessary use of lights and fans. I discuss any behavior problems with psychologists and take follow-up action as required.

In addition, I have experience in taking prayers and attendance every day, leaving bus and auto students first, and then assembling students in one class while taking turns minding them. I come to school pre-prepared and maintain several things, including Worksheet File, Assessment File, Lesson Plan Register, Assessments Register, General File, Folders for teacher's reference papers, Teaching Aids & Activities, Stationary Box, Aprons for students & teachers, Colors, Plates, Spoons, Glasses, Filter, Trays, Chalk, and Duster.

Overall, my diverse skills, experience, and dedication to teaching make me a valuable candidate for any Teaching positions.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Rewrite the following as expert CV writter, for a Teacher’s Resume summarize the below:
"
ROLE : SUBJECT INCHARGE
Sr. No	Responsibility
01	Planning worksheets, note book work, activities & Teaching Aids with heads and then getting it implemented with teachers.
02	Checking worksheets planned.
03	Feedback of worksheets conducted in classes.
04	Planning the portion for exams / assessments.
05	Planning the papers for assessments.
06	Monitoring correction.
07	To know everything about lessons being conducted in the classes allotted.
08	Monitor worksheets sent for photocopying and classes received.
09	To take weekly feedback of work completed.
10	Report any problems related to executions of the syllabus or teachers.
11	Meeting with Heads over a month & report the happening through the month.
12	Maintaining checklist to check syllabus completion.

"

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
As a Subject In-Charge, I have performed several key responsibilities related to planning and implementing worksheets, note book work, activities, and teaching aids with the collaboration of heads and teachers. I am accountable for checking the worksheets planned, conducting feedback sessions in classes, and planning portions for exams or assessments. Moreover, I have expertise in planning papers for assessments and monitoring the correction process.

I make sure to be aware of all lessons being conducted in my allotted classes and monitor the worksheets sent for photocopying and classes received. Additionally, I take weekly feedback of work completed and report any problems related to the execution of the syllabus or teachers.

I participate in monthly meetings with heads and report on the happenings through the month, maintaining a checklist to check syllabus completion. With my expertise and experience, I ensure seamless planning and implementation of study materials and assessments.

Overall, my skills and dedication to my role as a Subject In-Charge make me a valuable candidate for any Teaching positions.
